references.text: Airy Shaw, HK. 1954. Pentaphragmataceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 517-528

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 10 November 2024

species.citation: Kurz , Flora 55 (1872) 136 ; Airy Shaw, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1954) 519; Coritico et al., PJS 151 (2022) 2440. = Pentaphragma paucinerve Quisumb. & Merr. , PJS 37 (1928) 211; Type: BS 45634 Ramos & Edaño (NY, iso), Luzon: Mt Alzapan, forested slopes, 1700m, 22-May-1925.
species.distribution: Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines. JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Cagayan, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, NEGROS (photos), PANAY, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIBUYAN (photos).

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 20 (1922) 472 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 587; Airy Shaw, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1954) 522; Type: BS 36834 Ramos & Edaño (US, iso), Mindanao: Zamboanga del Sur, Malangas, Oct-1919.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Zamboanga, Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO.
species.notes: Along small streams in forests at low elevation. Fl. & fr. Oct-Nov.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 308 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 587; Type: Merrill 6136 (NY, US, iso), Mindoro: Mindoro Oriental, Alag River, Nov-1906.
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser: considered distinct from Pentaphragma grandiflorum by J.V. LaFrankie (21-May-2016). 100-1500m.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 322 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 587; Airy Shaw, Fl. Males. ser. 1, (1954) 520; Fernando et al., Forest Flora of Dinagat (2017) 79; Type: BS 35258 Ramos & Pascasio (US, iso), Dinagat: forests along small streams at low elevation, 12-May-1919.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Agusan del Sur (photos), Surigao del Norte.
species.notes: Primary lowland rainforest along small streams. Fl. May. 200m to 300-340m (photos).

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 7 (1915) 2572 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 588. ≠ Pentaphragma aurantiacum auct. non Stapf ; Airy Shaw, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1954) 521.
species.notes: From Mt Pulgar. Medium elevation primary forests. 1500-2700m.
